options.label: A
options.text: The distance the wave travels in one second

options.label: B
options.text: The distance between two identical points on consecutive waves

options.label: C
options.text: The height of the wave from bottom to top

options.label: D
options.text: The number of complete waves produced each second

explanation: Wavelength is the distance between repeating points on a wave, like from one peak to the next peak. It's usually measured in metres and represented by the Greek letter λ (lambda).
